string.name: fs_tool_demo_note
string.value: This page is a demo entry

string.name: fs_tool_desc_web
string.value: Demo: Open any webpage in the Web container, supporting URL interception, login token passthrough, and error page recovery.

string.name: fs_tool_desc_scan
string.value: ScanKit integration — scan QR codes and barcodes. URLs are automatically opened in the Web container.

string.name: fs_tool_desc_translate
string.value: Online translation via Google Translate in the Web container, supporting multi-language translation.

string.name: fs_tool_desc_file
string.value: System file picker (DocumentViewPicker) — select files from device storage and view file info.
